title: Morning Milking Session
caption: Our daily morning milking routine ensures fresh, pure milk for your family. Our cows are milked twice daily with utmost care and hygiene.

title: Cow Feeding Time
caption: Healthy cows produce quality milk. We feed our cattle with organic grass and nutritious feed to maintain their health and well-being.

title: Traditional Ghee Preparation
caption: Watching our traditional method of preparing pure, aromatic ghee. Made with love and patience, following age-old family recipes.

title: New Calf Birth
caption: Celebrating the birth of a healthy new calf! Our farm family continues to grow, ensuring sustainable dairy production for years to come.
